frontMatter.title: DG Athlete
frontMatter.description: An all-in-one training program, ecommerce, affiliate blog to help people reach their fitness goals at home

pageProps.markdown:
# DG Athlete

Digital fitness platform combining training programs, ecommerce, and an
affiliate content blog — built and operated end-to-end as founder and
technical lead.

## Overview

DG Athlete offered structured home fitness training programs alongside an
ecommerce storefront and an affiliate/SEO-driven blog. Training programs were
delivered as authored PDF guides paired with hands-on personal training,
rather than an in-app feature — the platform's role was content delivery,
commerce, and audience growth.

## Tech Stack

- **WordPress** — CMS for the site and affiliate blog
- **WooCommerce** — ecommerce storefront and payment processing
- **WP Engine** — managed hosting
- **Custom CSS/JS** — hand-built frontend on top of the WordPress theme layer

## Results

- Scaled to **500–1,000 daily active users**
- **99% uptime**
- **20,000+ monthly pageviews**
- Top-10 Google rankings for **15% of published content**, driven by
  targeted SEO strategy
